name: rule-feedback-dashboard
description: Dashboard for analyzing rule feedback from multiple sources

scripts.fetch-data: npm run fetch-atlan && npm run fetch-jira
scripts.build-data: npm run process-rspec && npx tsx scripts/build-data.ts
scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/main.js --format=esm && cp src/index.html dist/ && mkdir -p dist/data && cp data/combined.json dist/data/
scripts.dev: npm run build-data && npm run build && npm run serve
